title: Daoist Canon: Sanhuang Jing (Three Sovereigns Scripture) (Section 1)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Sanhuang Jing (Three Sovereigns Scripture)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Sanhuang Jing (Three Sovereigns Scripture)

translation.text: From the Sanhuang Jing (Three Sovereigns Scripture) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
